problem id: 4099319d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11011010 -> 01101110
  00011011 -> 10001101
  01100100 -> 00110011
  10011011 -> 11001111
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11000001 -> 11100011
  10100100 -> 01010000
  10011111 -> 11001101
  01010110 -> 00101010
  00101010 -> 00010101

query: 11000100
predicted answer: 01100001
